title: focus.data
description: The USER's current focus task — distinct from ai-status (which is what the AI is doing).

task.description: What the user is focused on right now.

big_text.description: Pre-formatted countdown / elapsed string, e.g. '12:43', '+3:00 over', or empty.

subtitle.description: Small footer line, e.g. 'started 12:18 · 25 min planned'.
